questions.question: 当前哪些物料是红色风险？
questions.answer: 根据最新评估（eval_date 为最大值），红色风险物料共20个，具体为：PN-00001（Carton 001）、PN-00002（Oil 002）、PN-00003（Preservative 003）、PN-00046（Carton 046）、PN-00068（Color 068）、PN-00082（Grain 082）、PN-00117（Protein 117）、PN-00139（Primary Label 139）、PN-00174（Case Label 174）、PN-00187（Grain 187）、PN-00211（Carton 211）、PN-00212（Oil 212）、PN-00213（Preservative 213）、PN-00214（Case Label 214）、PN-00248（Color 248）、PN-00266（Film 266）、PN-00271（Carton 271）、PN-00272（Oil 272）、PN-00273（Preservative 273）、PN-00297（Protein 297）。
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: PN-00003 当前的风险等级、DOI、缺口、断料日和风险原因是什么？
questions.answer: 生成的回答未通过数值校验，已拦截。
questions.sql:
SELECT material_pn, risk_level, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_reasons
FROM material_risk
WHERE material_pn = 'PN-00003'
  AND eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT material_pn, risk_level, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_reasons
FROM material_risk
WHERE material_pn = 'PN-00003'
  AND eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 当前 DOI 最低的 5 个物料是哪些？
questions.answer:
根据最新评估数据，DOI 最低的 5 个物料是：

- PN-00211 (Carton 211) — DOI 1.2 天
- PN-00271 (Carton 271) — DOI 1.6 天
- PN-00214 (Case Label 214) — DOI 1.7 天
- PN-00272 (Oil 272) — DOI 1.7 天
- PN-00002 (Oil 002) — DOI 2 天

以上物料的风险等级均为 “RED”。
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.doi_days, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_level
FROM material_risk r JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.doi_days, r.material_pn
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.doi_days, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_level
FROM material_risk r JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.doi_days, r.material_pn
LIMIT 5

questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_level
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)

questions.sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name, s.supplier_name, ss.split_pct
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN suppliers s USING (supplier_id)
WHERE ss.material_pn IN (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING count(DISTINCT supplier_id) = 1
)
ORDER BY ss.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name, s.supplier_name, ss.split_pct
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN suppliers s USING (supplier_id)
WHERE ss.material_pn IN (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING count(DISTINCT supplier_id) = 1
)
ORDER BY ss.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn,
       m.material_name,
       max(ss.split_pct) AS supplier_concentration
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY supplier_concentration DESC, ss.material_pn
LIMIT 10
questions.final_sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn,
       m.material_name,
       max(ss.split_pct) AS supplier_concentration
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY supplier_concentration DESC, ss.material_pn
LIMIT 10

questions.question: 按 commodity 和 item group 分别列出红色物料数和各组缺口合计。
questions.answer: 生成的回答未通过数值校验，已拦截。
questions.sql:
SELECT 'commodity' AS dimension_type, commodity AS dimension_value, red_count, total_gap_qty
FROM v_risk_by_commodity
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'item_group' AS dimension_type, item_group AS dimension_value, red_count, total_gap_qty
FROM v_risk_by_item_group
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY dimension_type, red_count DESC, dimension_value
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'commodity' AS dimension_type, commodity AS dimension_value, red_count, total_gap_qty
FROM v_risk_by_commodity
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'item_group' AS dimension_type, item_group AS dimension_value, red_count, total_gap_qty
FROM v_risk_by_item_group
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY dimension_type, red_count DESC, dimension_value) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.sql:
SELECT o.po_id, o.material_pn, o.qty, o.eta_date, s.supplier_id, s.supplier_name
FROM open_po o
JOIN suppliers s ON o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE o.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
ORDER BY o.qty DESC, o.po_id
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT o.po_id, o.material_pn, o.qty, o.eta_date, s.supplier_id, s.supplier_name
FROM open_po o
JOIN suppliers s ON o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE o.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
ORDER BY o.qty DESC, o.po_id
LIMIT 5

questions.sql:
SELECT s.sku_id, p.product_name, sum(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
WHERE s.date >= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) - 13
GROUP BY s.sku_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT s.sku_id, p.product_name, sum(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
WHERE s.date >= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) - 13
GROUP BY s.sku_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 历史上总销量最高的 5 个事件日类型是什么？
questions.answer: 根据结果集，历史上总销量最高的 5 个事件日类型依次为：LaborDay（17052）、IndependenceDay（16971）、SuperBowl（14733）、Ramadan starts（14641）、Eid al-Fitr（13811）。
questions.sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: LightGBM 未来 28 天预测量最高的 5 个成品是什么？同时给出产品名和最近 28 天实际总销量。
questions.answer:
根据结果集，LightGBM 未来 28 天预测量最高的 5 个成品如下：

1. **Contoso Frozen 068**（SKU: FOODS_3_586），预测 4777.15 件，最近 28 天实际销量 4532 件  
2. **Contoso Pantry 007**（SKU: FOODS_3_090），预测 4685.42 件，最近 28 天实际销量 7174 件  
3. **Contoso Snacks 021**（SKU: FOODS_3_252），预测 3763.11 件，最近 28 天实际销量 3890 件  
4. **Contoso Pantry 011**（SKU: FOODS_3_120），预测 3753.14 件，最近 28 天实际销量 3660 件  
5. **Contoso Snacks 069**（SKU: FOODS_3_587），预测 2543.78 件，最近 28 天实际销量 2460 件
questions.sql:
WITH forecast AS (
  SELECT sku_id, SUM(yhat) AS forecast_units
  FROM forecast_daily
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    AND date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
    AND date <= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) + INTERVAL 28 DAY
  GROUP BY sku_id
),
actual AS (
  SELECT sku_id, SUM(units_sold) AS actual_units
  FROM sales_daily
  WHERE date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 28 DAY
    AND date <= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
  GROUP BY sku_id
)
SELECT f.sku_id, p.product_name,
       ROUND(f.forecast_units, 2) AS forecast_units,
       COALESCE(a.actual_units, 0) AS actual_units
FROM forecast f
LEFT JOIN actual a ON f.sku_id = a.sku_id
JOIN products p ON f.sku_id = p.sku_id
ORDER BY f.forecast_units DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
WITH forecast AS (
  SELECT sku_id, SUM(yhat) AS forecast_units
  FROM forecast_daily
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    AND date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
    AND date <= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) + INTERVAL 28 DAY
  GROUP BY sku_id
),
actual AS (
  SELECT sku_id, SUM(units_sold) AS actual_units
  FROM sales_daily
  WHERE date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 28 DAY
    AND date <= (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
  GROUP BY sku_id
)
SELECT f.sku_id, p.product_name,
       ROUND(f.forecast_units, 2) AS forecast_units,
       COALESCE(a.actual_units, 0) AS actual_units
FROM forecast f
LEFT JOIN actual a ON f.sku_id = a.sku_id
JOIN products p ON f.sku_id = p.sku_id
ORDER BY f.forecast_units DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 按三折平均 MAPE 选出的最佳回测模型是什么？它的平均 MAPE 和 WRMSSE 是多少？
questions.answer: 按三折平均 MAPE 选出的最佳回测模型是 **lightgbm**，其平均 MAPE 为 47.47266666666667，平均 WRMSSE 为 0.8846666666666667。
questions.sql:
SELECT model_name,
       AVG(mape) AS avg_mape,
       AVG(wrmsse) AS avg_wrmsse
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape, model_name
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT model_name,
       AVG(mape) AS avg_mape,
       AVG(wrmsse) AS avg_wrmsse
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape, model_name
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 未来 28 天预测需求量最高的 10 个物料是哪些？
questions.sql:
WITH today AS (SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily)
SELECT d.material_pn, m.material_name, sum(d.demand_qty) AS total_demand
FROM v_material_demand_daily d
JOIN materials m ON d.material_pn = m.material_pn
CROSS JOIN today t
WHERE d.date > t.dt AND d.date <= t.dt + INTERVAL 28 DAY
GROUP BY d.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY total_demand DESC
LIMIT 10
questions.final_sql:
WITH today AS (SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily)
SELECT d.material_pn, m.material_name, sum(d.demand_qty) AS total_demand
FROM v_material_demand_daily d
JOIN materials m ON d.material_pn = m.material_pn
CROSS JOIN today t
WHERE d.date > t.dt AND d.date <= t.dt + INTERVAL 28 DAY
GROUP BY d.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY total_demand DESC
LIMIT 10

questions.question: 哪些料马上要断了，帮我把必须关注的都找出来。
questions.answer:
根据最新评估数据，以下物料已进入 **RED** 或 **ORANGE** 风险等级，必须立即关注：

**RED（极高风险）**  
- PN-00271（Carton 271）：缺口 5,843，预计 2016-05-24 缺料，DOI 1.6 天，LT覆盖率 0.02  
- PN-00272（Oil 272）：缺口 1,087，2016-05-24 缺料，DOI 1.7，LT覆盖率 0.02  
- PN-00211（Carton 211）：缺口 434，2016-05-24 缺料，DOI 1.2，LT覆盖率 0.02  
- PN-00003（Preservative 003）：缺口 13,153，2016-05-25 缺料，DOI 2.1，LT覆盖率 0.04  
- PN-00001（Carton 001）：缺口 6,191，2016-05-25 缺料，DOI 2.7，LT覆盖率 0.03  
- PN-00002（Oil 002）：缺口 3,357，2016-05-25 缺料，DOI 2，LT覆盖率 0.12  
- PN-00214（Case Label 214）：缺口 2,870，2016-05-25 缺料，DOI 1.7，LT覆盖率 0.05  
- PN-00212（Oil 212）：缺口 1,635，2016-05-26 缺料，DOI 3，LT覆盖率 0.14  
- PN-00273（Preservative 273）：缺口 590，2016-05-26 缺料，DOI 3.1，LT覆盖率 0.04  
- PN-00117（Protein 117）：缺口 1,382，2016-05-29 缺料，DOI 6.6，LT覆盖率 0.47  
- PN-00213（Preservative 213）：缺口 674，2016-05-29 缺料，DOI 5.9，LT覆盖率 0.16  
- PN-00082（Grain 082）：缺口 100，2016-06-06 缺料，DOI 13.8，LT覆盖率 0.45  
- PN-00068（Color 068）：缺口 842，2016-06-07 缺料，DOI 15.5，LT覆盖率 0.18  
- PN-00174（Case Label 174）：缺口 51，2016-06-07 缺料，DOI 18.3，LT覆盖率 0.57  
- PN-00266（Film 266）：缺口 435，2016-06-09 缺料，DOI 18.3，LT覆盖率 0.27  
- PN-00139（Primary Label 139）：缺口 263，2016-06-10 缺料，DOI 17.8，LT覆盖率 0.34  
- PN-00046（Carton 046）：缺口 1,758，2016-06-16 缺料，DOI 24.3，LT覆盖率 0.35  
- PN-00187（Grain 187）：缺口 127，2016-06-17 缺料，DOI 25.1，LT覆盖率 0.72  
- PN-00297（Protein 297）：缺口 48，2016-06-17 缺料，DOI 25.6，LT覆盖率 0.35  
- PN-00248（Color 248）：缺口 139，2016-06-18 缺料，DOI 26，LT覆盖率 0.59  

**ORANGE（高风险）**  
- PN-00129（Primary Label 129）：缺口 631，2016-06-09 缺料，DOI 17.3，LT覆盖率 1.33  
- PN-00118（Flavor 118）：缺口 158，2016-06-10 缺料，DOI 17.5，LT覆盖率 1.35  
- PN-00025（Bottle 025）：缺口 4,515，2016-06-11 缺料，DOI 18.5，LT覆盖率 1.32  
- PN-00007（Grain 007）：缺口 4,132，2016-06-12 缺料，DOI 18.7，LT覆盖率 1.87  
- PN-00140（Jar 140）：缺口 523，2016-06-12 缺料，DOI 20.1，LT覆盖率 1.34  
- PN-00048（Preservative 048）：缺口 3,249，2016-06-14 缺料，DOI 21.8，LT覆盖率 1.36  
- PN-00243（Preservative 243）：缺口 453，2016-06-17 缺料，DOI 24，LT覆盖率 1.2  
- PN-00190（Bottle 190）：缺口 58，2016-06-18 缺料，DOI 26.6，LT覆盖率 1.11  
- PN-00016（Carton 016）：缺口 280，2016-06-19 缺料，DOI 18，LT覆盖率 1.5  
- PN-00138（Preservative 138）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 20.3，LT覆盖率 0.47  
- PN-00177（Protein 177）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 31.4，LT覆盖率 0.4  
- PN-00193（Flavor 193）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 15.5，LT覆盖率 0.46  
- PN-00240（Pouch 240）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 35.8，LT覆盖率 0.41  
- PN-00274（Case Label 274）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 20.9，LT覆盖率 0.31  
- PN-00287（Oil 287）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 33.4，LT覆盖率 0.37  
- PN-00288（Preservative 288）：缺口 0，缺料日期无，DOI 29.6，LT覆盖率 0.38  

**解读**：RED 物料 LT覆盖率均远小于 1，DOI 不足提前期，现有库存无法支撑到补货到货，已出现或即将出现缺口；ORANGE 中前 9 项已有明确缺口日期，后 7 项虽缺口为 0 但 DOI 较低且 LT覆盖率 <1，同样面临补货不上风险。建议优先处理 RED 清单中缺料日期最早、缺口量大的物料，以及 ORANGE 中有明确缺料日期的物料。
questions.sql:
SELECT material_pn, m.material_name, risk_level, gap_qty, gap_date, doi_days, lt_coverage
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND risk_level IN ('RED', 'ORANGE')
ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'RED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, gap_date NULLS LAST, gap_qty DESC, material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT material_pn, m.material_name, risk_level, gap_qty, gap_date, doi_days, lt_coverage
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND risk_level IN ('RED', 'ORANGE')
ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'RED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, gap_date NULLS LAST, gap_qty DESC, material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

ORDER BY eval_date

  AND eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)

questions.question: DOI 是什么意思，我现在想看缺料。
questions.answer: DOI 是现有库存可支撑的天数（看 doi_days 列）。结果集中 gap_qty > 0 的行已在显示缺料（按缺口数量从大到小列出）。
questions.sql:
SELECT material_pn, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_level
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND gap_qty > 0
ORDER BY gap_qty DESC, material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT material_pn, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_level
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND gap_qty > 0
ORDER BY gap_qty DESC, material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 红色风险而且还是单源的物料，会影响哪些成品？
questions.answer:
红色风险且单源的物料共 9 个，影响的成品（SKU）如下：

- **PN-00214**（Case Label 214）：Contoso Beverage 054  
- **PN-00046**（Carton 046）：Contoso Snacks 005、Contoso Beverage 046、Contoso Beverage 050、Contoso Beverage 054、Contoso Snacks 069、Contoso Pantry 087  
- **PN-00212**（Oil 212）：Contoso Frozen 052  
- **PN-00068**（Color 068）：Contoso Frozen 008  
- **PN-00213**（Preservative 213）：Contoso Snacks 053  
- **PN-00273**（Preservative 273）：Contoso Snacks 013  
- **PN-00211**（Carton 211）：Contoso Pantry 051  
- **PN-00139**（Primary Label 139）：Contoso Pantry 079  
- **PN-00248**（Color 248）：Contoso Frozen 088  
- **PN-00297**（Protein 297）：Contoso Snacks 037
questions.sql:
WITH single_source AS (
    SELECT material_pn
    FROM supply_split
    GROUP BY material_pn
    HAVING count(*) = 1
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, b.sku_id, p.product_name
FROM material_risk r
JOIN single_source s USING (material_pn)
JOIN bom b USING (material_pn)
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn, b.sku_id
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH single_source AS (
    SELECT material_pn
    FROM supply_split
    GROUP BY material_pn
    HAVING count(*) = 1
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, b.sku_id, p.product_name
FROM material_risk r
JOIN single_source s USING (material_pn)
JOIN bom b USING (material_pn)
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn, b.sku_id) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.sql:

FROM sales_daily s
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)

questions.question: 现在缺口最大的料是什么？缺多少、还能撑几天、为什么危险？
questions.answer: 缺口最大的料是 Preservative 003（物料号 PN-00003），缺料 13153 件，库存仅能支撑 2.1 天。风险原因标记为“GAP_BEFORE_LT;LOW_DOI”，即缺料发生在提前期之前且 DOI 极低，意味着库存无法支撑到补货到货。
questions.sql:
SELECT m.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.doi_days, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT m.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.doi_days, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 被最多 SKU 共用的物料有哪些（并列都算）？一旦短缺会波及哪些 SKU？
questions.answer: 生成的回答未通过数值校验，已拦截。
questions.sql:
WITH sku_counts AS (
  SELECT b.material_pn, count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) AS sku_count
  FROM bom b
  GROUP BY b.material_pn
  HAVING count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) > 1
),
max_sku_count AS (
  SELECT max(sku_count) AS max_val FROM sku_counts
)
SELECT sc.material_pn, m.material_name, sc.sku_count,
       list(DISTINCT p.product_name ORDER BY p.product_name) AS affected_products
FROM sku_counts sc
CROSS JOIN max_sku_count msc
JOIN materials m ON sc.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN bom b ON sc.material_pn = b.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
WHERE sc.sku_count = msc.max_val
GROUP BY sc.material_pn, m.material_name, sc.sku_count
ORDER BY sc.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH sku_counts AS (
  SELECT b.material_pn, count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) AS sku_count
  FROM bom b
  GROUP BY b.material_pn
  HAVING count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) > 1
),
max_sku_count AS (
  SELECT max(sku_count) AS max_val FROM sku_counts
)
SELECT sc.material_pn, m.material_name, sc.sku_count,
       list(DISTINCT p.product_name ORDER BY p.product_name) AS affected_products
FROM sku_counts sc
CROSS JOIN max_sku_count msc
JOIN materials m ON sc.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN bom b ON sc.material_pn = b.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
WHERE sc.sku_count = msc.max_val
GROUP BY sc.material_pn, m.material_name, sc.sku_count
ORDER BY sc.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 接下来需求最高的三个成品是什么？按 LightGBM 看。
questions.answer:
根据 LightGBM 预测，未来需求最高的三个成品依次为：
1. Contoso Frozen 068（4777.15）
2. Contoso Pantry 007（4685.42）
3. Contoso Snacks 021（3763.11）
questions.sql:
SELECT f.sku_id, p.product_name, sum(f.yhat) AS total_forecast
FROM forecast_daily f
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
WHERE f.model_name = 'lightgbm'
  AND f.date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
GROUP BY f.sku_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_forecast DESC
LIMIT 3
questions.final_sql:
SELECT f.sku_id, p.product_name, sum(f.yhat) AS total_forecast
FROM forecast_daily f
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
WHERE f.model_name = 'lightgbm'
  AND f.date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
GROUP BY f.sku_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_forecast DESC
LIMIT 3

questions.question: LightGBM 未来 28 天总预测销量和最近 28 天实际销量分别是多少？
questions.answer: LightGBM 未来 28 天总预测销量为 99051.81，最近 28 天实际销量为 104881。
questions.sql:
WITH last_date AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS today FROM sales_daily
)
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(yhat) FROM forecast_daily WHERE model_name='lightgbm' AND date > (SELECT today FROM last_date) AND date <= (SELECT today FROM last_date) + INTERVAL 28 DAY) AS lightgbm_forecast_28d,
  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily WHERE date > (SELECT today FROM last_date) - INTERVAL 28 DAY AND date <= (SELECT today FROM last_date)) AS actual_sales_28d
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH last_date AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS today FROM sales_daily
)
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(yhat) FROM forecast_daily WHERE model_name='lightgbm' AND date > (SELECT today FROM last_date) AND date <= (SELECT today FROM last_date) + INTERVAL 28 DAY) AS lightgbm_forecast_28d,
  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily WHERE date > (SELECT today FROM last_date) - INTERVAL 28 DAY AND date <= (SELECT today FROM last_date)) AS actual_sales_28d) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 哪些有缺口的材料同时还有未到货采购单？
questions.sql:
SELECT mr.material_pn, m.material_name, mr.gap_qty,
       count(op.po_id) AS open_po_count, sum(op.qty) AS open_qty
FROM material_risk mr
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN open_po op ON mr.material_pn = op.material_pn
   AND op.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
WHERE mr.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND mr.gap_qty > 0
GROUP BY mr.material_pn, m.material_name, mr.gap_qty
ORDER BY mr.gap_qty DESC
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT mr.material_pn, m.material_name, mr.gap_qty,
       count(op.po_id) AS open_po_count, sum(op.qty) AS open_qty
FROM material_risk mr
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN open_po op ON mr.material_pn = op.material_pn
   AND op.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
WHERE mr.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND mr.gap_qty > 0
GROUP BY mr.material_pn, m.material_name, mr.gap_qty
ORDER BY mr.gap_qty DESC) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 供应商集中度超过 70% 的风险材料有哪些？只看当前非绿色的。
questions.answer:
供应商集中度超过 70% 且当前非绿色的风险材料共 55 个（结果仅展示前 50 行），全部为 100% 集中度。按 risk_level 和 gap_qty 降序排列如下：

- RED（缺料暴露）: PN-00214（Case Label 214，缺口 2870，2016-05-25）、PN-00046（Carton 046，1758，2016-06-16）、PN-00212（Oil 212，1635，2016-05-26）、PN-00068（Color 068，842，2016-06-07）、PN-00213（Preservative 213，674，2016-05-29）、PN-00273（Preservative 273，590，2016-05-26）、PN-00211（Carton 211，434，2016-05-24）、PN-00139（Primary Label 139，263，2016-06-10）、PN-00248（Color 248，139，2016-06-18）、PN-00297（Protein 297，48，2016-06-17）
- ORANGE: PN-00129（Primary Label 129，缺口 631，2016-06-09）、PN-00177（Protein 177，缺口 0）、PN-00287（Oil 287，缺口 0）、PN-00193（Flavor 193，缺口 0）、PN-00240（Pouch 240，缺口 0）、PN-00138（Preservative 138，缺口 0）
- YELLOW: PN-00027（Protein 027，缺口 0）、PN-00097（Grain 097，缺口 0）、PN-00109（Primary Label 109，缺口 0）、PN-00202（Grain 202，缺口 0）、PN-00206（Film 206，缺口 0）、PN-00131（Film 131，缺口 0）、PN-00217（Grain 217，缺口 0）、PN-00227（Oil 227，缺口 0）、PN-00234（Case Label 234，缺口 0）、PN-00052（Grain 052，缺口 0）、PN-00142（Grain 142，缺口 0）、PN-00260（Jar 260，缺口 0）、PN-00037（Grain 037，缺口 0）、PN-00169（Primary Label 169，缺口 0）、PN-00165（Pouch 165，缺口 0）、PN-00183（Preservative 183，缺口 0）、PN-00197（Oil 197，缺口 0）、PN-00095（Jar 095，缺口 0）、PN-00078（Preservative 078，缺口 0）、PN-00093（Preservative 093，缺口 0）、PN-00115（Bottle 115，缺口 0）、PN-00063（Preservative 063，缺口 0）、PN-00060（Pouch 060，缺口 0）、PN-00108（Preservative 108，缺口 0）、PN-00230（Jar 230，缺口 0）、PN-00152（Oil 152，缺口 0）、PN-00237（Protein 237，缺口 0）、PN-00137（Oil 137，缺口 0）、PN-00067（Grain 067，缺口 0）、PN-00254（Case Label 254，缺口 0）、PN-00255（Pouch 255，缺口 0）、PN-00124（Case Label 124，缺口 0）、PN-00269（Primary Label 269，缺口 0）、PN-00298（Flavor 298，缺口 0）
questions.sql:
WITH material_concentration AS (
  SELECT material_pn, max(split_pct) AS supplier_concentration
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING max(split_pct) > 70
)
SELECT c.material_pn, m.material_name, c.supplier_concentration,
       r.risk_level, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date
FROM material_concentration c
JOIN material_risk r USING (material_pn)
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level != 'GREEN'
ORDER BY c.supplier_concentration DESC, r.gap_qty DESC
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH material_concentration AS (
  SELECT material_pn, max(split_pct) AS supplier_concentration
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING max(split_pct) > 70
)
SELECT c.material_pn, m.material_name, c.supplier_concentration,
       r.risk_level, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date
FROM material_concentration c
JOIN material_risk r USING (material_pn)
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level != 'GREEN'
ORDER BY c.supplier_concentration DESC, r.gap_qty DESC) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 历史上哪个事件对应的销量最高？
questions.answer: 根据历史数据，销量最高的事件是 LaborDay，销量为 17052。
questions.sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 按每个 SKU 最新价格看，最贵的五个产品是什么？
questions.answer:
根据最新价格，最贵的五个产品是：

1. Contoso Snacks 057 – 6.98  
2. Contoso Frozen 044 – 6.98  
3. Contoso Beverage 050 – 5.98  
4. Contoso Beverage 062 – 5.98  
5. Contoso Frozen 012 – 5.44
questions.sql:
SELECT p.sku_id, pr.product_name, p.sell_price
FROM prices p
JOIN products pr USING (sku_id)
JOIN (
  SELECT sku_id, max(week_start) AS max_week
  FROM prices
  GROUP BY sku_id
) latest ON p.sku_id = latest.sku_id AND p.week_start = latest.max_week
ORDER BY p.sell_price DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT p.sku_id, pr.product_name, p.sell_price
FROM prices p
JOIN products pr USING (sku_id)
JOIN (
  SELECT sku_id, max(week_start) AS max_week
  FROM prices
  GROUP BY sku_id
) latest ON p.sku_id = latest.sku_id AND p.week_start = latest.max_week
ORDER BY p.sell_price DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 回测下来哪个模型的平均 MAPE 最好？
questions.answer: lightgbm 模型的平均 MAPE 为 47.47266666666667，是结果中最好的。
questions.sql:
SELECT model_name, avg(mape) AS avg_mape
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT model_name, avg(mape) AS avg_mape
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 给我一句话说明当前四个风险等级各有多少物料。
questions.answer: 当前四个风险等级中，绿色198个物料、橙色16个、红色20个、黄色66个。
questions.sql:
SELECT risk_level, count(*) AS cnt
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
GROUP BY risk_level
ORDER BY risk_level
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT risk_level, count(*) AS cnt
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
GROUP BY risk_level
ORDER BY risk_level) AS safe_query LIMIT 200
